ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fixture */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned in the match */,
  "was_home" INTEGER /* Indicates if the team was playing at home */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Time when the match kicked off */,
  "team_h_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "team_a_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the match */,
  "minutes" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators attending the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee who officiated the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match (e.g., 'Sunny', 'Rainy', 'Snowy') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_fixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("fixture_id") REFERENCES fixtures ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fixtures" (
  "fixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fixture */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season during which the fixture is played */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round of the fixture */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fixture */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the fixture is scheduled */,
  "is_postponed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fixture has been postponed */,
  "postponed_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the postponement (e.g., 'Weather', 'Health Concerns') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fixtures_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" INTEGER /* League the team is part of */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home stadium of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., 'Left', 'Right') */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract expires */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the player's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "top_scorer_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top scorer of the season */,
  "top_assister_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top assister of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_scorer_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_assister_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_assister_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the league */,
  "current_champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current champion team of the league */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the league's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_current_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date when the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_fee" INTEGER /* Fee for the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., 'Permanent', 'Loan') */,
  "loan_end_date" TEXT /* End date of a loan transfer */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_value" INTEGER /* Total value of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the referee */,
  "number_of_matches_officiated" INTEGER /* Number of matches officiated by the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id")
)
